question: What are the names of high schoolers who have 3 or more friends?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*)  >=  3
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.identifier FROM highschooler AS T1 JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.learner_key GROUP BY T1.key HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3;
raw_response: SELECT T1.identifier FROM highschooler AS T1 JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.learner_key GROUP BY T1.key HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3;
